sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 2496 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 19.09.2025 Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, advocate for the applicant Mr. Imtiaz Ali advocate for respondent It is jointly submitted that the impugned order is not sufficiently reasoned and comprises entirely of reproduction and one paragraph of a conclusion. In view hereof, it is sought that the impugned order be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
